title: Edinburgh MSc AI
description: MSc AI at University of Edinburgh. Sep 2026.

title: v0 by Vercel
description: AI-powered full-stack app builder — generates React/Next.js apps from natural language with database integrations.
notes: 6M+ users and now supports Snowflake + AWS DB connections. This is basically a cheat code for rapid prototyping stocksbrew or lumi features — describe what you want, get working code.

title: Bolt.new
description: Browser-based AI dev environment by StackBlitz — build full-stack apps with direct code access.
notes: More dev-oriented than v0 — you get direct code access so you can actually understand and tweak what it generates. Great for weekend project ideas or rapid MVPs for roastmyresume-style apps.

title: Ntsc-rs - Open-Source VHS/Analog TV Effects
description: Rust-based video emulator that adds authentic analog TV and VHS artifacts. Runs in-browser or as a library.
notes: 402 points on HN today. Could be sick for YouTube thumbnails or intro effects - retro VHS vibes without After Effects. Open-source Rust too.

title: How is Linear So Fast? Technical Breakdown
description: Deep dive into performance engineering behind Linear - caching, optimistic updates, rendering strategies.
notes: 346 pts on HN. Linear is the gold standard for fast web apps. Directly applicable to stocksbrew or yourtrace perf optimization.
